description_long: This is a single-bladed axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with visible grain and carved details, giving it a rustic and hand-crafted appearance. The handle is capped with a pointed pommel and reinforced at the top with metal rivets, suggesting durability and secure attachment. The blade is broad, made of metal, and displays intricate decorative engravings on its surface, adding an ornamental touch. The blade has a pronounced beard and a sharp, slightly curved cutting edge, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. The overall color palette consists of natural wood browns and metallic silvers, with the blade's engravings providing visual contrast. The axe appears well-balanced and functional, suitable for use in urban settings such as parks, garages, or maintenance areas.
description: A decorative, single-bladed axe with a carved wooden handle and an engraved metal blade, featuring a rustic and sturdy design.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the blade, showing the pointed pommel and the narrow profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the ornate engravings on the metal blade and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The back view displays the rear of the axe head and the full length of the handle, with the pointed pommel visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the detailed blade engravings and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, carved details, and a pointed pommel; ergonomic grip, oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a pronounced beard, sharp curved edge, and ornate engraved patterns; one cutting edge, flat poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and riveted mounting with visible metal rivets securing the blade to the handle.
